transformed_query: WITH latest AS (SELECT t.dimension_code AS ticker, m.dimension_code AS metric, dp.value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.dimension_code, m.dimension_code ORDER BY dp.time DESC) AS rn, dp.series_id FROM data_points AS dp JOIN dimensions AS t ON t.series_id = dp.series_id AND t.dimension_type = 'ticker' AND t.dimension_code IN ('ETN', 'ROK', 'GE', 'EMR', 'WAB', 'TT', 'GLW', 'FAST', 'WCC', 'VRT', 'HON', 'JCI', 'CMI', 'PCAR', 'DE', 'OTIS', 'CARR', 'COHR', 'FN', 'LITE', 'AME', 'WTS', 'FLS', 'CR', 'ITT', 'LII', 'DHR', 'IR', 'IEX', 'CAT', 'ALLE', 'AMAT', 'KLAC', 'RTX', 'HWM', 'TDG', 'WWD') JOIN dimensions AS m ON m.series_id = dp.series_id AND m.dimension_type = 'metric_code' AND m.dimension_code IN ('cash_and_st_investments', 'cash', 'short_term_debt', 'long_term_debt', 'long_term_debt_current', 'shares_diluted', 'shares_outstanding') WHERE dp.series_id IN (SELECT series_id FROM series WHERE series_id LIKE '%consolidated_quarterly') AND dp.time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15 MONTHS') SELECT ticker, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'cash_and_st_investments' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS cash_sti, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'cash' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS cash, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'short_term_debt' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS st_debt, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'long_term_debt' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS lt_debt, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'long_term_debt_current' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS ltd_current, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'shares_diluted' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS sh_diluted, MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'shares_outstanding' AND rn = 1 THEN value END) AS sh_out FROM latest GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY ticker
